MOTION FOR WITHDRAWAL OF ATTORNEY OF RECORD
Off Calendar Jan-08-2019 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Appearances:
Yong Thye Lin, 510-505-4877 appearing on behalf Celestix Networks in Pro Per through Court Call.
Paul Gumina, Esq. 408-313-3410 for Defendant Celestix Network Inc. through Court Call.

RULING - A R G U E D. Hearing is held. Non party informs the Court he does not oppose the motion. The Court having reviewed the pleadings and having heard oral argument rules as follows:

LAW OFFICE OF PAUL GUMINA, P.C. AND ATTY. PAUL GUMINA'S MOTION FOR WITHDRAWAL OF ATTORNEY OF RECORD.

Granted. Order is signed. (see scanned order for details)
